title: Biome Resonance Enchanting
description: Enchanting table enchants match the surrounding biome, granting unique enchantment bonuses and exclusive enchantments based on where they are placed.
body:
# Biome Resonance Enchanting ❄️

Transform your enchanting experience with location-based magic! This datapack revolutionizes enchanting by making the biome around your enchanting table directly influence the enchantments offered.

## Biome-Specific Enchantments

- **Cold Biomes** (Snowy Tundras, Frozen Peaks): Enhanced Frost Walker and higher-level Protection enchantments
- **Hot Biomes** (Desert, Badlands): Boosted Fire Aspect, Blast Protection, and Unbreaking levels
- **Aquatic Biomes** (Ocean, Rivers): Superior Respiration, Aqua Affinity, and Depth Strider, plus reduced-cost Riptide for tridents
- **Lush Biomes** (Jungle, Lush Caves): Improved Fortune, Looting, and Luck of the Sea odds

## Exclusive Combinations

Rare biomes like Mushroom Fields and Deep Dark unlock completely unique enchantment combinations impossible to obtain elsewhere.

## Strategic Gameplay

This system encourages building multiple enchanting outposts across different biomes instead of centralizing everything in one location, adding exploration incentives and strategic base placement to your enchanting adventures.
